rationale: Both evaluations rest on the exact same substantive argument — no demonstrated experience in growth engineering, A/B testing, feature flagging, or experimentation platforms, plus a scope that reads as team-level rather than the cross-organizational Principal/IC6 mandate. Neither evaluation references the career gap or its dates at all, so the bounded gap change drove nothing in the reasoning. The 1-point score difference (4 vs 3) and the reworded strengths/concerns are within ordinary run-to-run variation, not a response to the demographic signal.
